body: PASS 14: worked through the queue -- pass 10's Part B (soft-membership Phase 3B fit) is now shipped. WARRANT#28, SLS(43)/9.57, compiled clean. Same approach as the bracket entries: built it as a NEW, PARALLEL optimizer (OptimizeComponentWeightsForRegimeSoft), gated by UseSoftMembershipFitting=false by default -- the existing hard-regime win-rate optimizer runs completely unchanged unless you flip that on. Reason for going parallel instead of rewriting in place: the existing optimizer is deeply interleaved with the multi-stage ladder logic and is what every regime's live weights currently come from -- rewriting that under time pressure in the same session as three other big changes would be exactly the kind of unearned risk the zero-regression rule exists to prevent. This way you can A/B it on a real run before it's ever the default. What it actually does: soft membership via the already-measured Phase 2 transition matrix (a bar's hard regime gets full credit, regimes it commonly transitions to/from get half credit -- so every bar can now teach more than one regime instead of only its argmax bucket), the objective is expectancy (mean R-multiple) not win-rate, bars get gated on legibility before fitting using the existing WARRANT#22 entropy trim, the search is 40 IC-seeded candidates instead of a 62,500-combo grid with a log-scaled selection penalty, and any weight that lands within 0.05 of neutral gets reported as inert instead of carried silently. forge_ledger.json pass_14 filed. Five builds queued now (SLS 39-43), still none run -- recommend attaching SLS(43) manually via the GUI, running once with the default optimizer first, then a second run with UseSoftMembershipFitting=true to actually compare them, rather than testing the new path blind.
